description: Detects insecure deserialization in Python: pickle.loads/load, marshal.loads/load, shelve.open, yaml.load. Simplified from Rust: flags all attribute calls on any object. Cannot filter to only pickle/marshal/yaml objects or check for SafeLoader without #match? predicate support.

flag.message: Attribute call detected -- verify this is not pickle.loads, pickle.load, marshal.loads, marshal.load, shelve.open, or yaml.load with untrusted data
